opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge of ensuring consistent, safe operation in a distributed system like this is immense—especially when dealing with potentially catastrophic failure modes. Consider adding a layered redundancy system with independent verification paths; a single point of failure, even with sophisticated monitoring, can be disastrous. It’s a fascinating application of agentic principles to a traditionally highly-specialized, human-controlled process.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents for complex task orchestration touches on the core challenges of reliability and safety presented by this project, particularly in the context of real-world, high-stakes systems.
